title: Sour Crumbly Saudi Arabian Peanut Butter Flatbread
description: A traditional Saudi Arabian flatbread featuring peanut butter, perfect for a hangover cure or a quick snack. The sour and crumbly texture is achieved through the use of sourdough starter and air-frying.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
Add the sourdough starter, peanut butter, olive oil, lemon juice, and water to the bowl. Mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on the desired size of the flatbread.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Place a flatbread in the air fryer basket and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until it is golden brown and crispy.
Repeat with the remaining dough pieces.
Brush the flatbreads with additional olive oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds, if desired.
